THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CHANG, M.D. PH.D, TENING RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SARKAR, ARINDAM $2,220.46 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,380.46, TERMS: $500.00 BY FEB-25-09; $500.00 ON OR BEFORE MAR-16-09; $500.00 ON OR BEFORE APR-15-09; $500.00 ON OR BEFORE MAY-15-09; $380.46 ON OR BEFORE JUN-15-09. IN THE EVENT THE RESPONDENT IS NOT IN RECEIPT OF ANY OF THE ABOVE PAYMENTS IN THE AMOUNT AND ON THE DATE SET FORTH IN PARAGRAPH 2 HEREIN, RESPONDENT MAY EXECUTE ON THE JUDGMENT AS ENTERED, LESS CREDIT FOR ANY AMOUNTS PAID THROUGH THE DATE OF DEFAULT. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:12AM
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Arindam Sarkar, appears through counsel, Gary W. Sullivan; Respondent, Tening Chang, MD, appears in Pro Per. Both sides, previously sworn, inform the Court that they have a stipulated settlement. (Louise Comora, appearing with Dr. Chang is sworn as a witness but does not testify.) Mr. Sullivan states the terms of the settlement, and Dr. Chang concurs. Mr. Sullivan will send Judge Myles a stipulated judgment for review. The clerk will keep the file until the judgment is returned and entered.
Terms of agreement:
Total judgment of: $2020.86, plus costs of $160.00 for a total of $2380.46.
The appellant agrees to pay the amount in installments as follows:
Feb 25, 2009, $500.00
Mar 16, 2009, $500.00
Apr 15, 2009, $500.00
May 15, 2009, $500.00
Jun 15, 2009, $380.46
10:25AM
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is identified or retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Continued To Dec-04-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
